title: pi-workflows LoopSpec lacks expression-based termination predicates (until / untilBudgetRemaining); maxAttempts hardcoding cannot express loop-until-dry / loop-until-condition canonical patterns without manual gate+break shims inside the loop body
description: Per R-0014 recon axis 4: Claude Code workflows let the script body express loop-until-dry via arbitrary expression gates (while loop with break on condition). pi-workflows loop step is hardcoded to maxAttempts (number) or attempts (expression evaluating to number) — both terminate by COUNT, not CONDITION. Loop-until-dry (terminate when no new issues found across iterations) requires a manual gate+break shim inside the loop body that's brittle + verbose + doesn't express the operator's intent at the spec level. Loop-until-budget-remaining (terminate when token budget drops below threshold) cannot be expressed at all — pi-workflows has no aggregate budget surface (see FGAP-141).

evidence.reference: Part 3 axis 4 — Loop-Until-Dry / Loop-Until-Budget / Loop-Until-Count — ADOPT verdict
LoopSpec definition + execution — currently only maxAttempts / attempts; no until / untilBudgetRemaining

impact: Operators expressing iterative-refinement workflows (review → improve → check → repeat-until-clean) must hardcode iteration counts that either over-iterate (waste tokens after convergence) or under-iterate (terminate before convergence). The canonical loop-until-dry pattern from Claude Code workflows docs cannot be expressed natively; requires manual nested gate+break shims that defeat the spec's declarative intent.
canonical_vocabulary: expression-based loop termination; until-condition predicates; budget-aware termination
proposed_resolution: Extend LoopSpec with optional fields: 'until: <expression>' (terminate when expression evaluates truthy AFTER each iteration; supersedes maxAttempts when both are set OR runs alongside as 'either-first' termination per executor decision); 'untilBudgetRemaining: <number>' (terminate when global budget.remaining() < threshold; depends on FGAP-141 budget surface). Updates: packages/pi-workflows/src/workflow-spec.ts (LoopSpec interface + AJV schema); packages/pi-workflows/src/step-loop.ts (executor short-circuits when until evaluates truthy); packages/pi-workflows/src/expression.ts (expression context exposes loop.iteration + loop.priorAttempts for predicate access).
